DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_JOB_PERMIT_STATUS]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_JOB_PERMIT_STATUS]
( 
	[PermitStatusID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PermitStatus] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,
	[LP_PermitStatusID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
